get.summary: Get the active room realtime media session
get.description: Returns the provider session currently bound to the authenticated room member.

connectionId.description: Room connection ID associated with the session

createdAt.description: Unix epoch milliseconds when the session was created

updatedAt.description: Unix epoch milliseconds when the session was last updated

404.description: No active session or runtime not found

post.summary: Create a room realtime media session
post.description: Creates a Cloudflare Realtime session for the authenticated room member.

connectionId.description: Specific room connection ID to bind the realtime session to
Room connection ID associated with the session

reused.description: Whether an existing provider session was reused

post.summary: Generate TURN / ICE credentials for room realtime media
post.description: Generates ICE server credentials for the authenticated room member.

ttl.description: Requested TURN credential TTL in seconds

urls.description: ICE server URL or URL list

iceServers.description: ICE servers returned by Cloudflare TURN

post.summary: Add realtime media tracks to a room session
post.description: Creates or subscribes realtime tracks for the authenticated room member.

connectionId.description: Specific room connection ID to bind the track operation to

location.description: Track direction relative to the caller

sessionId.description: Provider session ID associated with this track

trackName.description: Track name used by the provider

bidirectionalMediaStream.description: Whether the track should be bidirectional

kind.description: Track kind reported by the provider

errorCode.description: Provider-level error code for this track

errorDescription.description: Provider-level error description for this track

tracks.description: Tracks to create or subscribe to

autoDiscover.description: Ask the provider to auto-discover remote tracks

publish.description: Optional room media state updates to apply after track creation

errorCode.description: Provider-level error code for this track

put.description: Closes provider tracks for the authenticated room member and optionally unpublishes room media state.

force.description: Force close even if the provider reports the track as active

unpublish.description: Optional room media state cleanup after closing tracks
